system.effect: The psyker takes control of existing flames within range, shaping, moving, or extinguishing them at will. He can move a fire up to his Psy Rating in metres per round, increase or decrease its intensity, or snuff it out entirely.

description.value: The psyker seizes psychic control over existing fires within range, bending them to his will. He can reshape flames, move them, increase or decrease their intensity, or extinguish them entirely. Fires can be moved up to Psy Rating metres per round. This power cannot create fire from nothing — there must be an existing flame source to manipulate.
